# PromptDiff

> Compare LLM outputs across models with one API call.

PromptDiff is a developer API that compares outputs from multiple large language models simultaneously. Send one request with your prompt and a list of models, and receive structured results showing each model's output, latency, token usage, and cost.

## Key Features
- Cross-model comparison in a single API call
- Supports Claude (Anthropic), GPT (OpenAI), Gemini (Google), and Grok (xAI)
- 8 models available: claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5, gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, gemini-2.5-pro, gemini-2.5-flash, grok-3, grok-3-mini
- Real-time latency and cost tracking per model
- Python and TypeScript SDKs
- REST API with Bearer token authentication

## Pricing
- Free: 100 evaluations per month (mini models only, no credit card required)
- Paid: LLM API cost + 40% margin (pay-as-you-go)
- Monthly spend limit configurable

## Quick Start
Sign up at https://promptdiff.bizmarq.com/signup to get an API key.

## API Endpoint
POST https://promptdiff.bizmarq.com/api/v1/compare
